name: au-crypto-tax
description: > Use this skill whenever asked about Australian cryptocurrency taxation. Trigger on phrases like \"crypto tax Australia\", \"Bitcoin CGT\", \"ATO crypto\", \"crypto capital gains\", \"personal use asset crypto\", \"staking income\", \"airdrop tax\", \"DeFi tax Australia\", \"crypto cost base\", \"crypto trading tax\", \"Coinbase tax\", \"Swyftx tax\", \"CoinSpot tax\", \"NFT tax Australia\", or any question about how cryptocurrency is taxed by the ATO. This skill covers CGT treatment of crypto
author: openaccountants
